title: RESTORE - 211info
text: HABITAT FOR HUMANITY GRESHAM RESTORE RESTORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Sells donated new and reclaimed building materials, pre-owned furniture and appliances, and a variety of home improvement items. Proceeds from sales help build Habitat for Humanity homes for local low-income families. Donation pick-up is available. 610 NE 181st Avenue Portland, OR 97230 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Wednesday-Monday 10am-6pm; donations accepted until 5:45pm Email (503) 575-7336 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 575-7336 Intake (971) 229-8888 Donation Hotline Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Items priced individually; cash and credit cards accepted. Donation pick-up $40. DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Sunday 10am-6pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus lines 87 and 25 Services: Donation Pickups Low Cost Building Materials/Supplies Thrift Shops If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
